design_philosophy: Clean, modern, and minimal. Focus on functional components, removing unnecessary elements. Information hierarchy using subtle borders and structured grids.

components.button: rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-black
components.table_header: bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-200 text-gray-500 font-medium py-3 px-4
components.input: w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-black focus:border-black
components.modal_content: bg-white rounded-lg shadow-xl border border-gray-200 p-6

dashboard.header: bg-white border-b border-gray-200 px-8 py-4 flex justify-between items-center sticky top-0 z-50
dashboard.table_container: bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 shadow-sm overflow-hidden mt-6

login_background.description: Minimalist white architecture abstract - used for the login page split screen background

icons.usage: Use stroke-width='1.5' for a cleaner, modern look

accessibility_and_testing.focus_states: All interactive elements must have clear focus rings (e.g., focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black focus:outline-none)
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: Mandatory data-testid attributes for forms, inputs, buttons, and table rows (e.g., data-testid='login-email-input')

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Shadcn UI components for Tables, Forms, Inputs, Dialogs (modals for add/edit/delete), and Pagination.
Implement a minimalist top navbar or sidebar for the admin layout.
Ensure table rows have a subtle hover state (hover:bg-gray-50).
Use the color palette strictly. Primary actions are black/dark gray for a stark 'Swiss' high-contrast look.
Data table should include Search (text input) and Filter (status dropdown) in the header section above the table.
Forms for Add/Edit should ideally be displayed within Shadcn Dialog components to avoid page navigations, keeping the flow fast.
Include a confirmation Dialog (AlertDialog from Shadcn) before deleting a student.
Toast notifications (Sonner) must be used for success/error messages upon CRUD operations.
Add 'data-testid' to all key elements for testing.
